The Plaza at Punchbowl

Part of The Plaza Assisted Living · Honolulu, Honolulu County, Hawaii

  • Independent Living
  • Assisted Living

Contact & Location

Address
918 Lunalilo St, Honolulu, HI 96822 · Map
Website
theplazaassistedliving.com
Community size
Large community

About The Plaza at Punchbowl

The Plaza at Punchbowl is a multistory senior living community near downtown Honolulu operated by Hawaii-based The Plaza Assisted Living, offering independent living and assisted living. Reviews are strongly positive, averaging 4.3 out of 5 across 29 ratings on Senior Care Authority and 4.7 out of 5 on AssistedLivingCenter, with residents praising the staff and day-to-day services.

Care offered here

  • Independent Living — what independent living includes and who it fits
  • Assisted Living — what assisted living includes and who it fits

Care needs usually grow over time. Ask every community what happens when your parent needs more care than their current level — moving twice is hard on everyone. See levels of care explained.

Lifestyle & Services

Every community sets its own rules on pets, couples moving in together, and age requirements — and its own menu of medical and non-medical services, including transportation. Ask for the current policies and a full service list in writing; details here can change and anything unlisted should be confirmed on your tour.

Official Ratings & Inspections

Assisted living and residential care are licensed and inspected by the state, not Medicare. Look up this community's license and inspection history at the Hawaii Department of Health, Office of Health Care Assurance.

Family reviews: 4.3/5 across 29 ratings on Senior Care Authority; 4.7/5 across 10 reviews on AssistedLivingCenter (July 2026). Public reviews are a useful signal — here's how to read them — and weigh them alongside official inspections.

How to read ratings and inspection reports — and how to check complaint records fairly (a fixed problem is no longer a problem).

Do you work at The Plaza at Punchbowl?

Families make one of their biggest decisions with pages like this one — and nobody can describe your community better than the people who work there. If you're on staff or manage this community, you can update these details, answer short topic-by-topic questionnaires (each takes just a few minutes), and share photos of your community. It's free, and accurate listings help the right families find you.

Claim & update this listing

Senior Living Community is an independent information resource for families. We are not a referral service and do not provide medical, legal, or financial advice — for decisions about care, consult the professionals involved. Facility details change; always confirm directly with a community. Last data review: 2026-07-11. Run a senior living community? Claim your free listing or see our marketing services for communities.
